title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 17th April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: First choice in EV/two-wheeler space; captured the market, better bet even in declines.
recommendations.detail: For the EV space, first choice is TVS Motors, because in two-wheelers they've captured the market; better bet even in declines. Ola/Ather can be looked at; watch for a turnaround.

recommendations.note: Preferred data-centre supplier play; makes parts for US partner, feeding data centres indirectly.
recommendations.detail: More bullish on data-centre suppliers than operators (operator business risks becoming commoditised). MTAR on the radar — makes some parts for its US partner, indirectly feeding data centres.

recommendations.note: Buy big conglomerates/holding companies; up 3%, can base around 2,000.
recommendations.detail: Buy big industrial groups/conglomerates/holding companies. Adani Enterprises performed well, up over 3%; can now base around 2,000. GKG-Partners-into-Adani report boosted Adani stocks.

recommendations.note: Stabilising/recovering from lows, crossed 50; institutional selling stopped, will rise on performance.
recommendations.detail: Hold; slowly stabilising and in a recovery process from the low; already crossed 50 and stabilising; institutional selling has stopped; from here it rises depending on performance.

recommendations.note: Switch to State Bank; couldn't cross 25-26, trades back near 20.
recommendations.detail: Repeatedly advises switching to State Bank instead. Despite recent developments (even a Middle-East major bank stake), the stock couldn't cross 25-26 levels and trades back near 20.

recommendations.note: Preferred over Yes Bank; shift Yes Bank holdings into SBI.
recommendations.detail: Recommended as the shift destination from Yes Bank.

recommendations.note: Buy/add; small negative (fire-accident court matters) will pass; restructuring + demerger ahead; big commodity player.
recommendations.detail: Buy / can add. Small negative today (court matters from the fire accident) will pass over time; more corporate restructuring and a demerger exercise ahead; one of the bigger commodity players amid a strengthening commodity rally.

recommendations.note: Caller at 500% profit; hold, no need to panic.
recommendations.detail: Caller holding ~3,000 shares at 500% profit; hold for now, no need to panic.

recommendations.note: Buy on declines, not now; June-ending could be weak (treasury yields fell, large PSU treasury books).
recommendations.detail: Buy on declines, not now. Results maybe a bit better but June-ending could be weak; treasury yields fell and PSU banks hold large treasury portfolios — buy on a dip, no rush.

recommendations.note: Buy on declines, not now; trading near 52-week highs, gauge its strength.
recommendations.detail: Buy on declines, not now. Trading near 52-week highs, so must understand how much strength it shows.

recommendations.note: Earlier suggestion; result good, stock +16-17% - a good development.
recommendations.detail: Earlier suggestion by Kutumba Rao; result was good and the stock jumped 16-17% - a good development.
